'''Neelabi''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Neelabi (species)|Neelabi]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. The Neelabi had a social hierarchy built upon competition.

{{Planet-stub}}
